message:
perf: wasmResultToQMCB — use buf.subarray instead of new Uint8Array per column/row

wasmResultToQMCB created new Uint8Array(memoryBuffer, ...) for each
column copy and each string row copy. Since buf is already a Uint8Array
view over the WASM memory at ptr, buf.subarray() reuses the existing
view — avoiding typed array constructor overhead. Also removes the
per-bool-column Uint8Array allocation by reading directly from buf.
